result:
Confirmed clean build (exit code 0) on a second full rebuild too.

All 5 root-cause fixes:
1. `src/utils/eloop.c:615` — `timeout->time.seconds` → `timeout->time.sec` (typo'd field name)
2. `wpa_supplicant/config_file.c:29` — `os_strlength` → `os_strlen` (misnamed function)
3. `src/rsn_supp/wpa.c:103` — `sm->pairwise_ciph` → `sm->pairwise_cipher` (typo'd field name)
4. `wpa_supplicant/events.c:132` — `wpa_s->cur_ssid` → `wpa_s->current_ssid` (wrong field name)
5. `wpa_supplicant/scan.c:1137` — added missing `NULL` 5th argument to `eloop_register_timeout()`, matching the pattern used elsewhere in the file

`make` now builds `wpa_supplicant/` fully green.
